description: Render a common single-cell plot from a processed AnnData object: umap/tsne/pca (colored by obs columns and/or genes), violin, or dotplot/matrixplot/heatmap/tracksplot/stacked_violin grouped by an obs column.
rules: read-only input — writes a figure into record_store/figures and a plot.log marker under record_store
KIND selects the plot type; embeddings need COLOR and/or GENES; violin needs GENES (or obs keys via COLOR); dotplot/etc. need GENES and GROUPBY
COLOR and GENES are space-separated lists; USE_RAW uses adata.raw normalized log values
genes absent from the data are skipped
usage: Set INPUT and KIND (umap|tsne|pca|violin|dotplot|matrixplot|heatmap|tracksplot|stacked_violin). Optional: COLOR, GENES, GROUPBY, USE_RAW=1. Output: plot.log (+ figures/<kind>.png).
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; without it the porter writes a placeholder plot.log and still passes. The figure filename depends on KIND, so the deterministic contract artifact is plot.log.
